chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3851 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15743 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15744 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Zahid Nawaz Awan, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Office objections to be complied with within a week. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.501 of 2025 under Section 91, CNS Act, 2022 registered at police station Gulistan-e-Jauhar, Karachi. Now the CNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted; therefore, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
